seo.title: Wink | The Closed-Loop Commerce Engine for Hotels
seo.metaDescription: Create demand. Convert bookings. Own the guest. Four modules: Extranet, Studio, WinkSocial, WinkLinks. Plus Booking Engine, Network, Traveliko and API.
seo.ogTitle: Wink Products | One Platform for Direct Booking Routes
seo.ogDescription: Understand the Wink product stack: four user-facing modules, Booking Engine, Network, Traveliko, and developer access.

content.h1: One platform. Every route to a direct booking.
content.summary: Create demand. Convert bookings. Own the guest. Four modules: Extranet, Studio, WinkSocial, WinkLinks. Plus Booking Engine, Network, Traveliko and API.

fields.h1: One platform. Every route to a direct booking.

fields.body: Create demand. Convert bookings. Own the guest. Four modules: Extranet, Studio, WinkSocial, WinkLinks. Plus Booking Engine, Network, Traveliko and API.

fields.heading: Choose the next step that fits your role.
fields.body: Create demand. Convert bookings. Own the guest. Four modules: Extranet, Studio, WinkSocial, WinkLinks. Plus Booking Engine, Network, Traveliko and API.

cards.title: Extranet
cards.body: The hotel control center. Set up property content, photos, amenities, rates, inventory, promotions, sales channels, partner rules, and Booking Engine configuration.

cards.title: Studio
cards.body: The distribution lab. Create Social Links, Web Components, maps, cards, lists, and bookable assets for posts, websites, newsletters, campaigns, and partner channels.

cards.title: WinkSocial
cards.body: The hotel content engine. Generate, schedule, review, approve, and publish hospitality-native content in the hotel voice, with bookable paths attached.

cards.title: WinkLinks
cards.body: The bookable link-in-bio storefront. Claim an i.trvl.as link, add live hotel cards, customize the brand feel, and send visitors to checkout.

cards.title: Booking Engine
cards.body: Rooms, F&B, spa, experiences, packages, and add-ons in one Stripe-powered checkout.

cards.title: Network
cards.body: Hotels set terms. Partners discover bookable inventory. Attribution stays connected.

cards.title: Traveliko
cards.body: A Wink-operated consumer channel layer with hotel-controlled rates, perks, packages, and participation.

cards.title: API / SDKs
cards.body: Super apps, banks, agencies, and platforms can build their own front end on Wink commerce rails.

cards.title: Hotels
cards.body: Control supply, publish bookable content, run direct booking, activate partner demand, and keep the guest relationship.

items.question: What products are inside Wink?
items.answer: Wink includes four user-facing modules: Extranet, Studio, WinkSocial and WinkLinks, plus Booking Engine, Network, Traveliko, REST APIs and SDKs underneath.

items.question: What is the difference between modules and platform layers?
items.answer: Modules are the surfaces users work in directly. Platform layers run underneath: Booking Engine executes the transaction, Network connects supply to partners, Traveliko adds a consumer channel, and REST APIs and SDKs let builders integrate the stack.

items.question: Who uses Studio?
items.answer: Hotels and partners use Studio to generate bookable Social Links, Web Components, maps, grids, lists, cards, banners, the Itinerary Picker, and partner distribution assets.

items.question: Where does Traveliko fit?
items.answer: Traveliko is Wink's consumer channel layer inside the product stack. Hotels keep control of rates, perks, packages, and channel participation.

items.question: Can developers build with Wink?
items.answer: Yes. Wink exposes REST APIs and SDKs covering search, booking, payment, webhooks, channel logic, and integration flows.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
